title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Elior India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Elior India
jsonLd.description:
Elior India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Noida. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Elior India:
Elior India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Elior India!
